# Introduction

This is a book created from markdown and executable code.

See @knuth84 for additional discussion of literate programming.


Hello world!


```{r quiz-setup, include = FALSE}
library(exams)
library(exams2forms)
exercise_directory <- file.path("exams", "exercises") #run exams-setup.R first to install example questions
exm <- list(
  file.path(exercise_directory, "swisscapital.Rmd"),
  file.path(exercise_directory, "deriv.Rmd")
)
```

Which of the following villains is not an adversary of Batman? `r forms_schoice(c("Bane", "Riddler", "Thanos", "Poison Ivy"), c(FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE), display = "dropdown")`.

```{r quiz, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, results = "asis"} 
exams2forms(exm, n = 3)
# exams2forms(list("swisscapital.Rmd", "swisscapital.Rmd"), solution = FALSE)
```
